mapper.sql: A.IMAGE_ID AS imageId, A.IMAGE_NM AS imageNm, A.IMAGE AS image, A.IMAGE_FILE AS imageFile, A.IMAGE_DC AS imageDc, A.REFLCT_AT AS reflctAt, A.FRST_REGISTER_ID AS userId, TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS regDate
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_MAIN_IMAGE A WHERE 1=1
SELECT FROM TB_MAIN_IMAGE A WHERE A.IMAGE_ID = #{imageId}
SELECT FROM TB_MAIN_IMAGE A WHERE A.REFLCT_AT = 'Y' ORDER BY A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM DESC
SELECT FROM TB_MAIN_IMAGE A WHERE A.IMAGE_ID = #{imageId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_MAIN_IMAGE (IMAGE_ID, IMAGE_NM, IMAGE, IMAGE_FILE, IMAGE_DC, REFLCT_AT, FRST_REGISTER_ID, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM) VALUES (#{imageId}, #{imageNm}, #{image}, #{imageFile}, #{imageDc}, #{reflctAt}, #{userId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_MAIN_IMAGE SET IMAGE_NM = #{imageNm}, IMAGE_DC = #{imageDc}, REFLCT_AT = #{reflctAt}, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE IMAGE_ID = #{imageId}
